name: Thomas Buses Inc
notes: Intrastate NYC school bus operator at 2859 W 37th St Brooklyn NY 11224; affiliated with First Steps Transportation Inc (per Yellowpages/Manta). No exact FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Thomas Buses Inc' or related variants (likely intrastate-only, no USDOT required for NYC schoolbus-only ops). NYSDOT Bus Operator Profile 2022-23 lists 'THOMAS BUSES INC' (Operator ID 29010) Brooklyn with 58 inspections, 0 OOS; and 'THOMAS BUSES INC(BRONX)' (Operator ID 61570) with 47 inspections, 1 OOS. NY DOS Document #1732782, filed 1993-06-08, status Active (statement past due per bizprofile).

name: K & K Bus Line & K Bus Line
registry_source: Not located in NY DOS public inquiry
notes: 24 E Main, Richmondville NY 12149 (Schoharie County). No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found under 'K & K Bus Line', 'K&K Bus', 'K AND K BUS', or any RICHMONDVILLE-NY variant - likely intrastate-only operator with no USDOT. Yelp listing for K & K BUS LINE in Richmondville remains visible as of Jan 2026 (operating status unclear). name: TFD Bus Co
registry_source: Public legal-record sources (Lyons v. Lancer Insurance, 2d Cir. 2012; T.F.D. Bus Co. v. Mt Vernon CSD, 237 A.D.2d 448, 1997)
notes: T.F.D. Bus Co., Inc. ceased business operations in 2007 (per 2d Cir. opinion Lyons v. Lancer Insurance, 2012). Was a private interstate common carrier based in Mount Vernon NY, ~85% revenue from school-bus contracts with Mount Vernon, New Rochelle, and Yonkers school districts; owned ~90 vehicles incl. yellow school buses, other buses, cars, minivans. Not present in current FMCSA SAFER (no active record under TFD BUS, T.F.D., or T F D matching Mount Vernon NY). Not present in NYSDOT Bus Operator Profiles 2021-22 or 2022-23, consistent with cessation in 2007. NY DOS incorporation date / DOS ID not located via web search; entity treated as DISSOLVED/INACTIVE.

name: Willow Bus Svc Inc
usdot: 17409 (affiliate Pierce Coach Line Inc; Willow itself has no separate FMCSA record)
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Auth. For Hire + Priv. Pass. (Business)
fmcsa_address: 37 Mineola Avenue, Roslyn, NY 11576 (Pierce Coach Line Inc - affiliate)
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (Pierce Coach Line); Willow Bus Svc itself shown CLOSED on Yelp
entity_status: Active (per NY DOS, statement past due since 2009)
notes: Willow Bus Service Inc - NY DOS Doc #91905, filed 7/16/1953, CEO Lawrence Pierce Sr., principal office Villa Marina, Mineola Ave, Roslyn NY 11576. Entity 'Active' per DOS but biennial statement past due since 7/31/2009; Yelp lists 'WILLOW BUS SVCE - CLOSED' at Mineola Ave Roslyn. Operations appear to have been folded into Pierce Coach Line Inc (USDOT 17409, MC-484804) at 37 Mineola Avenue, Roslyn NY 11576 - same Pierce family ownership, immediately adjacent address. Pierce Coach Line: 52 power units, 52 drivers, intrastate-only passenger carrier, MCS-150 dated 9/26/2025, mileage 584,206 (2023), Authorized For Passenger. NYSDOT operator profile 2022-23 lists 'PIERCE COACH LINES' (Operator ID 03207) Roslyn with 146 inspections; no separate 'Willow Bus' listing. No standalone FMCSA USDOT record for Willow Bus Service Inc found.

name: Northern Westchester Bus-Truck
usdot: 804963 (Hudson Valley Bus Company Inc - INACTIVE; possibly successor entity)
fmcsa_address: 6 Dogwood Rd, Cortlandt Manor NY 10567 (Hudson Valley Bus Co address)
fmcsa_status: FMCSA SAFER record INACTIVE (USDOT 804963 Hudson Valley Bus Co Inc); no record under exact name 'Northern Westchester Bus-Truck'
registry_source: Not located in NY DOS / opengovny.com under exact name
notes: Address 6 Dogwood Rd, Cortlandt Manor NY 10567 - shared with Hudson Valley Bus Co Inc (USDOT 804963, INACTIVE per SAFER) and Hudson Valley Charter Service Inc (USDOT 1314945, ACTIVE - 6 power units, 9 drivers, MC-526059, passenger authorized, family-owned since 1965 per company website, founded by/operated by Knipponberg family). 'Northern Westchester Bus-Truck' is most likely a former/historical name or DBA used by the Hudson Valley Bus / Hudson Valley Charter operation at that address. NYSDOT 2022-23 operator profile lists 'HUDSON VALLEY BUS CO' (Operator ID 02889) Cortlandt Manor 8 inspections, and 'HUDSON VALLEY CHARTER SERVICE INC' (Operator ID 42838) 12 inspections. No exact corporate match for 'Northern Westchester Bus-Truck Corp' located in NY DOS public inquiry searches.
